eval_name: PR workflow for contributing to r-lib/gargle with usethis

expectations.evidence: Line 45: usethis::create_from_github(repo_spec = "r-lib/gargle", fork = TRUE); also line 388

expectations.text: Correct PR workflow order (fork/clone -> init -> work -> push -> finish)
expectations.evidence: Quick reference lines 388-414: create_from_github -> pr_pull_upstream -> pr_init -> work -> pr_commit -> pr_push -> pr_open -> ... -> pr_finish. Required subsequence present in order.
